# Vendor Selection Matrix (Draft)

## 1. Telephony
- Twilio: strong APIs, HIPAA BAA available, flexible routing
- Retell: optimized for AI voice, simpler integration

## 2. STT
- Deepgram: strong real-time STT, medical vocabulary support
- AssemblyAI: easy API, good accuracy
- Google STT: high accuracy, enterprise compliance

## 3. TTS
- ElevenLabs: natural voices, good prosody
- Amazon Polly: stable, enterprise readiness
- PlayHT: realistic voices, lower latency

## 4. LLM
- OpenAI GPT-4o: strong reasoning, function calling
- Claude: strong summarization and safety
- Grok: alternative option

## 5. Hosting / DB
- AWS (RDS + KMS): HIPAA-ready with BAA
- GCP (Cloud SQL + KMS): HIPAA-ready with BAA

## Selection Criteria
- BAA availability
- Latency
- Cost per minute
- Reliability SLA
- Integration complexity
